properties.addr:street: 7th Street, Managiri, KK Nagar, Madurai, Tamil Nadu.
properties.description:
This unassuming hotel across from Vandiyur Lake is 2 km from the Gandhi Memorial Museum, 5 km from Madurai East train station and 6 km from Meenakshi Amman Temple.
Relaxed rooms with sofas feature Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs, as well as en suite wet rooms.
